name: FOBIA  ...worse than fear.
short_description: An adventure of exploration, intrigue and psychological terror of great originality.
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a unique single-player experience that blends intrigue, exploration, and psychological horror in "Fobia ...worse than fear". Navigate through 9 unique maps, taking on challenging objectives while confronting terrifying foes, from fierce dogs and giant spiders to spine-chilling monsters and ghosts.

In this shadowy realm, you'll need to gather essential items like batteries to keep your flashlight lit, vitamins to preserve your health, and keys to unlock mysterious doors or access new maps. Other items will unlock thrilling cinematic sequences that enrich the narrative.

"Fobia ...worse than fear" stands out as an adaptation of the 12-minute short film of the same name, adding depth to the experience. The story unfolds abruptly, maintaining a constant state of intrigue as you progress. Psychological horror and anxiety intensify, leading to a surprising conclusion that sheds light on all the mysteries.

Take on the role of Nerea, a defenseless protagonist surrounded by nightmares and paranormal events, without weapons or combat skills. Your only means of survival are stealth and evasion. With no radar, map, or compass to guide you, trust your intuition and the signal from your racing heart, which increases when danger draws near.

"Fobia ...worse than fear" encourages realism and immerses you in the feeling of being lost, pursued, and alone. Control your character in third-person view, with the option to switch to a first-person perspective with a simple click.

With two difficulty levels and availability in English, Spanish, and Euskera, "Fobia ...worse than Fear" emerges as a genuinely original gaming experience, designed to cater to all mystery and horror enthusiasts.

      "There Is something worse than fear..."



-------------------------- Consult the game support for any questions. -------------------------
